items.title: Turnstile Announce 2026 Tour With Openers Including Slayyyter, Clipse, Vince Staples, & More
items.summary: Last year they brought Blood Orange, Mannequin Pussy, Amyl And The Sniffers, Speed, and Jane Remover with them in the US. Now, they're announcing a North American tour with Slayyyter, Clipse, Vince Staples, and more. The post Turnstile Announce 2026 Tour With Openers Including Slayyyter, Clipse, Vince Staples, & More appeared first on Stereogum.

items.title: Mannequin Pussy & Wednesday Announce Bitch Cabal Tour
items.summary: Mannequin Pussy and Wednesday are two of our finest indie rock bands. This fall, you might get to see both of them in the same night, since they've just announced plans to cross the American South on what they're calling the Bitch Cabal Tour. The post Mannequin Pussy & Wednesday Announce Bitch Cabal Tour appeared first on Stereogum.

items.title: Swapmeet – “Halfway”
items.summary: The Adelaide, Australia indie rock band Swapmeet recently made a bunch of noise with their singles "I Know!," "Sand," and "2 C U," and they're one month away from the release of their full-length debut Mount Zero. Today, they announce a North American tour and share the skittering, whispery new single "Halfway." It sounds like circa-now bedroom-pop, but with just the slightest hint of old-school post-punk skronk.

items.title: Turnstile announce tour with Clipse, Slayyyter, Texas Is The Reason, Vince Staples, Cold World & more
items.summary: Terror, Ceremony, Agnostic Front, Hatebreed, Haywire, Yves Tumor, Nourished by Time, and so many others are also lined up for this run

Springsteen, Santana, Joel Honor Clive Davis

items.title: Brandon Flowers Turns Rootsy On Solo LP
items.summary: The Killers frontman Brandon Flowers will release THRASHER, his first solo album in more than 10 years.
